title: Galaxy Hole
description: Drag a black hole around the city to consume cars, buildings, and asteroids! Grow bigger as you devour everything in sight.
controls: Drag to move the hole. Consume objects smaller than you to grow bigger.

title: Goal Keeper
description: Block flying soccer balls with quick reflexes! Drag to dive, tap to jump. How many shots can you save?
controls: Drag to move keeper. Tap to jump. Block the ball!

title: Fruit Slice Master
description: Slice flying fruits with lightning-fast swipes! Juicy physics, combo multipliers, and explosive bombs.
controls: Swipe or click and drag to slice fruits. Avoid bombs!

title: Snake.Go
description: A neon retro snake reimagined! Glide across a pixel grid, eat glowing apples, and grow longer.
controls: Arrow keys or swipe to change direction

title: Pixel Flap
description: Tap to flap your wings and weave through endless pipes! Classic side-scroller with pixel-art charm.
controls: Tap / Click / Space to flap

title: Coin Catcher
description: Catch falling coins and gems in your basket while dodging bombs! Build combos for massive multipliers.
controls: Drag or Arrow keys to move the basket

title: Brick Smash
description: Smash through colorful neon bricks with a bouncing ball. Progress through levels.
controls: Drag or Arrow keys to move paddle. Tap / Space to launch.

title: Bubble Shooter
description: Aim and shoot colored bubbles to match 3 or more! Classic bubble shooter with chain reactions.
controls: Aim with mouse/touch, tap or click to shoot.

title: Color Sort
description: Sort colored liquids into matching tubes! A relaxing yet challenging puzzle.
controls: Tap a tube to pick up liquid, tap another to pour.

title: Stack Tower
description: Tap to stack blocks and build the tallest tower! Time your drops for PERFECT combos.
controls: Tap or click to drop the block.

title: Block Drop
description: Classic block-stacking puzzle! Arrange falling tetrominoes to clear lines. Speed increases as you level up.
controls: Arrow keys or swipe to move. Tap or Up arrow to rotate.

title: 2048 Merge
description: Slide and merge numbered tiles to reach 2048! The iconic addictive puzzle.
controls: Arrow keys or swipe to slide tiles

title: Memory Flip
description: Flip cards and match pairs to clear the board. Choose 4x4 or 6x6 difficulty.
controls: Tap or click cards to flip and match pairs

title: Neon Blaster
description: Top-down neon space shooter! Blast through waves of enemy ships, dodge incoming fire.
controls: Drag or WASD/Arrows to move. Auto-fire enabled.

title: Quick Math 60
description: 60-second arithmetic rush! Build exam-level speed calculation for SSC, Banking, Railways.
controls: Tap the correct option. Build combos for bonus points.

title: Sudoku Pro
description: Classic 9x9 Sudoku with 4 difficulty levels. Hints, pencil marks, mistake counter, auto-save.
controls: Tap a cell, then tap a number 1-9.

title: GK Blitz
description: 260+ verified General Knowledge MCQs for UPSC, SSC, Banking exams.
controls: Tap the correct option. Blitz mode: 60s.

title: Number Ninja
description: Find the next number in the pattern! Essential for Bank PO and SSC quant sections.
controls: Tap the correct answer.

title: Code Cracker
description: Decode letter-number patterns and ciphers. SSC and Banking reasoning section practice.
controls: Analyze pattern, tap correct answer.

title: Memory Master
description: Train working memory: Digit Span, Pattern Grid, Sequence modes.
controls: Memorize then reproduce sequence.

title: Word Groups
description: Group 16 words into 4 themed categories. NYT Connections style.
controls: Tap 4 words that belong together, then SUBMIT.

title: Word Wise
description: Master exam vocabulary: Synonyms, Antonyms, and Analogies. 419 word pairs.
controls: Tap the matching word.

title: India Map Master
description: Master Indian Geography: States, Capitals, Rivers, Neighbors.
controls: Read the clue, tap the correct state.

title: Mini Crossword
description: Daily 5x5 crossword with Indian GK and vocabulary clues.
controls: Tap a cell, use the on-screen keyboard.

title: True or False
description: Rapid-fire 60-second GK challenge. 210+ verified statements.
controls: Tap TRUE or FALSE.

title: Odd One Out
description: Find the item that doesn't belong! 400+ classification puzzles.
controls: Tap the odd item.

title: DI Drill
description: Speed-drill Data Interpretation questions for Bank PO, SSC, CAT.
controls: Analyze chart, tap correct answer.

title: Constitution Quest
description: Drag Indian Constitution articles to their correct Parts. UPSC Polity practice.
controls: Drag the article card to the correct Part.

title: Timeline Rush
description: Order Indian history events chronologically. 240 verified events across 5 eras.
controls: Drag events into correct order.

title: Scheme Match
description: Memory-match game with 68 verified government schemes.
controls: Tap pairs to match scheme name to description.

title: PM Quest
description: Connect Indian Prime Ministers to their iconic acts, events, and quotes.
controls: Tap a PM, then tap the matching item.
